title: IIT Dharwad Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Nursing Superintendent Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) has published the latest job notification for the recruitment of various Nursing Superintendent Jobs. Candidates with B.Sc Nursing, GNM, and Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Dharwad Notification 2026 . Here we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date o...
